flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Los Angeles Harbor College fell 49% between 2009 and 2010 (7.8% → 4.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Los Angeles Harbor College fell 29% between 2007 and 2010 (20.3% → 14.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Los Angeles Harbor College rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($590 → $700).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Los Angeles Harbor College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.6k).
